headline: Blockchain Capital is a tokenized venture fund (BCAP) on zkSync Era; core contracts not yet discovered in accessible on-chain sources
short_headline: BCAP token on zkSync Era; contracts undiscovered

findings.text: zkSync Era block explorer unavailable via fetch tool; cannot perform direct name-tag search for BCAP or Blockchain Capital contracts

No canonical 'deployed contracts' documentation found on blockchaincapital.com or linked docs; RWA.xyz lists Blockchain Capital as an asset manager with BCAP on zkSync Era but does not provide contract addresses
No audit reports linked in protocol inputs; no audit PDFs discovered in available sources

GitHub org BlockchainCap (https://github.com/BlockchainCap) contains 10 repositories focused on infrastructure (zk-vote, node-provider-benchmark, swaymigo, fuel-order-book, etc.); none appear to be the BCAP token contract. Separate repo BCAPtoken/BCAPToken exists for Ethereum token but does not contain zkSync Era deployment info
Single chain (zkSync Era) in protocol.chains; no multi-chain enumeration needed
BCAP is a token, not a factory; no child contract enumeration required
No admin/governance addresses discoverable without on-chain contract reads
Insufficient on-chain evidence: BCAP token contract address on zkSync Era not yet sourced from fetched URLs

rationale.verdict: Grade=unknown because the BCAP token contract address on zkSync Era could not be discovered from accessible sources. Website and GitHub provide no deployments documentation. RWA.xyz confirms BCAP exists on zkSync (migrated December 2024) but does not list contract addresses. Block explorer is blocked from fetch. Without the contract address, admin addresses, and on-chain bytecode inspection cannot proceed.

evidence.shows: Blockchain Capital website; company homepage with portfolio, about, blog sections; no technical deployments documentation or contract addresses listed

RWA.xyz confirms Blockchain Capital as asset manager with BCAP distributed on ZKsync Era ($963.6M value as of 2026-05-04); shows 1 RWA (BCAP token) on single network (ZKsync Era) but does not list contract address

Blockchain Capital GitHub org with 10 repositories; repositories are infrastructure/tooling focused (zk-vote governance, node-provider-benchmark, swaymigo for Fuel, fuel-order-book, etc.) rather than BCAP token contract deployment
Confirms BCAP token migrated to ZKsync Era in December 2024; issued with support of Securitize; RedStone now provides price feed on zkSync Era but article does not list BCAP contract address
RWA.xyz asset page for BCAP; identifies BCAP as third fund from Blockchain Capital, first tokenized fund and security token; no contract address provided

unknowns: D1-offchain: zkSync Era block explorer not fetched (blocked by allowlist); cannot search for BCAP name tags or contract deployments
D2-offchain: Canonical deployed contracts doc not found; blockchaincapital.com does not link to /docs/deployments or similar page with contract addresses
D3: No audit links provided in protocol inputs and none discovered in fetches
D4: BCAP token contract not identified in BCAPtoken/BCAPToken GitHub repo (Ethereum version) or BlockchainCap org repos
D8: Contract address for BCAP on zkSync Era not yet sourced; required for admin_addresses enumeration

protocol_metadata.about: Blockchain Capital is a pioneering venture capital fund established in 2013, focused on investing in blockchain and cryptocurrency projects. BCAP is Blockchain Capital's third fund, tokenized as the first security token fund, providing fractional non-voting economic interest in the fund. The BCAP token was migrated to zkSync Era in December 2024 to enable DeFi integration and is classified as a real-world asset (RWA).
